lines.english: You bless the poor with wealth, O Lord.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Countless sins are taken away, and the mind becomes immaculate and pure.
Service to the Lord, our Sovereign King, is fruitful and rewarding.
You bestow Your Name upon Your devotee. ||1||
All the mind's desires are fulfilled, and one's tasks are perfectly accomplished.
God eradicates the disease from the diseased person.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨਹਾਰ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਾ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karan karaavanahaar suaamee taa te birathaa koe na jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is the Creator, the Cause of causes; no one is turned away from His Door empty-handed. ||1||Pause||
God takes away the sorrows of the suffering.
And those who have no place at all - You seat them upon the place.
You link Your slave to devotional worship. ||2||
The fear of all fear disappears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਅਪਨੇ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan apane kai har man basai |3|
lines.english: The Lord dwells within the mind of His humble servant. ||3||
He makes the foolish and ignorant become clever and wise.
God bestows honor on the dishonored.
The Supreme Lord God is the Treasure of Peace.
Granting His Grace, He enjoins the mortals to serve the Saints.
The Ambrosial Name of the Lord is the essence of reality.
O Nanak, such a person merges in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||4||23||36||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮੰਡਲ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant manddal meh har man vasai |
lines.english: In the Realm of the Saints, the Lord dwells in the mind.
In the Realm of the Saints, one's lifestyle is immaculate.
In the Society of the Saints, one comes to love the One Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮੰਡਲ ਮਹਿ ਦੁਰਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਨਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant manddal meh durat sabh nasai |
lines.english: In the Realm of the Saints, all sins run away.
where only the Glorious Praises of the Supreme Lord God are sung. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮੰਡਲ ਮਹਿ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣੁ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant manddal meh janam maran rahai |
lines.english: In the Realm of the Saints, birth and death are ended.
That alone is called the Realm of the Saints,
In the realm of the saints, the Lord's Name is chanted. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮੰਡਲ ਮਹਿ ਜਮੁ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਕਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant manddal meh jam kichhoo na kahai |
lines.english: In the Realm of the Saints, the Messenger of Death cannot touch the mortal.
In the Society of the Saints, one's speech becomes immaculate
The Realm of the Saints is the eternal, ever-stable place.
In the Realm of the Saints, the immaculate sermon is spoken.
In the Realm of the Saints, sins are destroyed.
In the Realm of the Saints, is the Lord, the Treasure of Virtue.
In the Society of the Saints, the pain of egotism runs away. ||3||
The Realm of the Saints cannot be destroyed.
O Nanak, He is woven into the fabric of His devotees, through and through. ||4||24||37||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The Realm of the Saints is the resting place of our Lord and Master.
That person, upon whom God showers His Mercy
- Death hovering above him is turned away. ||1||
Why worry about disease, when the Lord Himself protects us?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਦੂਖੁ ਸੰਤਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan hoe na dookh santaap |
lines.english: That person whom the Lord protects, does not suffer pain and sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਜਾਮੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis cheet aavai tis sadaa sukh hovai nikatt na aavai taa kai jaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When He comes to mind, the mortal finds lasting peace, and the Messenger of Death cannot even approach him. ||1||Pause||
The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is forever our Help and Support.
What has been produced from the source?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਇਹੁ ਨ ਸੋ ਤਬ ਕਿਨਹਿ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jab ihu na so tab kineh upaaeaa |
lines.english: When this being did not exist, who created him then?
He cherishes His devotees forever. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਹਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh jaanahu tis kai haath |
lines.english: Know that everything is in His Hands.
He Himself kills, and He Himself rejuvenates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sukh paaveh tis ke gun gaau |3|
lines.english: Singing His Glorious Praises, you shall find peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dukh bhanjan taa kaa hai naau |
lines.english: His Name is the Destroyer of pain.
My God is the Master of the masterless.
O my Lord and Master, please listen to the prayer of Your Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸਭ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag teraa sabh tujheh dhiaae |
lines.english: All this world is Yours; it meditates on You.
I place my soul, my breath of life and wealth before You.
